name: User Access
formula:
LEN(USERNAME())<=6 
OR USERNAME()="PP0F98CL" 
OR USERNAME()="JD46C91L"
OR USERNAME()="AS3F7A7L"
OR USERNAME()="CJ4B116L"
OR USERNAME()="LT4312AL"


// Equipe visupilot migration PBI: 

OR USERNAME()= 'CE1659FL'
OR USERNAME()= 'AH4D9B9L'
OR USERNAME()= 'NG0B3B1L'
OR USERNAME()= 'LB4F812L'
OR USERNAME()= 'AB15559L'
OR USERNAME()= 'CT32EDFL'
OR USERNAME()= 'SA0E0F7L'
OR USERNAME()= 'LT4312AL'


AND USERNAME()!= "Tous les utilisateurs"
